entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management

entry.title: Hi All, We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds.
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have scheduled a job with custom report and the runtime was around 40K seconds. How can I get the  root cause for longer runtime of the job that was executed few days back. I have check in the job log, but there's no detailed information. Also checked ST03N and couldn't get much information about the root cause. I understand that trace ST05 should be enabled, but its a production system. Is there any other way to find the reason for longer runtime of the job (report is custom - Zreport and assigned with variant). 

Appreciate if anyone help with their inputs.

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Onboarding: Enhancements to the E-Verify Further Action Notice process
entry.content:
Hi Thomas

Thank you for your detailed write-up on this. Can you please clarify the below points?

  • Social Security Number to use to generate this scenario
    • I created a new hire using the format you described, and the E-Verify case successfully closed out without generating a TNC. i made sure the middle numbers were '78' and the 8th number was a value between 1-6. Can you provide additional detail on this step?
  • What are the names of the two new templates that need to be enabled for this process to work?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
Hello 

 

If you have a requirement to update the number of containers then you should look at using the "manual sample calc." indicator in the 09 inspection type set up for the material.  It will require the user to use 'Manage Inspection lots' app - Change Inspection lot option to update the inspection lot where you can manually enter in the containers and perform the sample calculation when using Recurring Inspections of Batches

 

In S/4HANA Cloud the available BADI's are documented at Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) in Quality Management

 

A suitable BAdIs for the requirement to copy from Batch is currently not available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere News in April
entry.content:
Thank you for your feedback BenedictV.

There is a customer influence request about this topic, but has very few votes at the moment. Voting for the feature helps us to prioritize.

The user does not want this excel sheet to open up and data should be display. we are in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Vendor Report by IO Type and Clearing Date
entry.content:

Is there a standard SAP report in ECC 6.0 which lists Vendor invoices/credit memos by IO/IO type and Clearing date (Payment date)?

entry.title: Re: Configure Your Business Processes: An Introduction to SAP Central Business Configuration
entry.content:
Hello Olof,

I just saw your comment here, so sorry for the late reply. I hope you've gotten help elsewhere in the meantime.

If not, to provide you an answer, this depends on your contract. Customers with contracts from before 2021 do not use SAP Central Business Configuration, but the Manage Your Solution app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. Customers with contracts as of September 2022 should be able to see their SAP Central Business Configuration tenants in SAP for Me. Generally speaking, you can find the links to access SAP Central Business Configuration in the welcome emails sent to you after contract closure. Hope that helps.

Best regards, 
Fabian

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite for DEV and PROD
entry.content:
Hello,

we want to setup SAP Integration Suite to implement iFlows. 
So we need a DEV system to design the iFlows and a PROD system for the released iFlows.
What ist the best way to setup this scenario? 
Do we need two subaccounts in BTP Cockpit? One for DEV and one for PROD or is it possible to separate the two areas within the Intergration Suite, or can we use two different space in Cloud Foundry Environment?

Thanks for your proposals.

It shows the scope item with a test script for me 

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: SAP TM Convert SAP Query SQ01 into SAP TM POWL.
entry.content:
Please note this is my personal insights!

In this blog, I will explain a standard way to convert an SAP Query (old school), to be use in SAP TM in the Worklist as Query.

SAP Query is a join of tables which you can convert in a report and assign to a Transaction. A transaction also can be assigned to a Fiori.

In this example I have create a query with the tables /SCMTMS/D_TORROT and /SCMTMS/D_TORITE. This query is to have the overview of the Freight documents with the Item level, Material, Kg. Volume, etc.

Transaction SQ02

The result of this join of TM tables we see the fields which I defined in the Infoset.

The steps to convert this Infoset/Query into an SAP TM POWL we will need to create an empty structure. Transaction SE11.

After the steps above go to transaction SQ_REPORT_INFOSET and give the report Infoset name and created it.

Inform the name of the Report (technical) which is generated in the previous Query and the structure name and accept it.

Now in the next screen follow the steps:

Execute first on head level, beside in the new structure will appear the result of the report them Generate the Structure bottom.

Now we can see the structure is generated with the fields from the Infoset used in the Query.

The follow steps are to use the report WDK_GENERATE_POWL_CUST and execute it. Transaction SE38.

Namespace= /xxx/

Usergroup= The name you’ve created for use in the transaction SQ01/SQ02.

InfoSet Query ID = The name you’ve gave to query in the transaction SQ01/SQ02.

Once you execute it will become available the Query in the background of the POWL transactions.

I the POWL_COCKPIT transaction we can see the query ID available:

In this case I have linked this new one into the Freight Order Worklist. (SCMTMS_POWL_FRO)

Here we can see the result of the query in the Worklist.

Note SAP TM is structure with BOBF Framework and a guidance for develop with ABAP OO. Ensure to not impact in the performance of the worklist.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3233018

https://developers.sap.com/group.abap-custom-ui-s4hana-cloud.html

https://me.sap.com/notes/1692542

https://me.sap.com/notes/2228926

Hope that can help you.

Thank you and regards

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: how can we expose Fiori Launchpad shell plugins to SA...
entry.content: It's a serious forum just like any other - the better you ask question the better the answer you get. It seems from your question that you haven't yet invested time to go to help.sap.com and search for "work zone shell plugin". At the same time you invested time questioning if this was a serious forum. Do you need support on this search? Should anyone guess that you have already tried to create the shell plugin? Should someone figure it out that you are talking about a plugin deployed in BTP or a plugin to be exposed via CDM3? As I have no crystal ball I decided to help you saying that indeed, it's possible.

entry.title: Re: how can we expose Fiori Launchpad shell plugins to SA...
entry.content: This might be helpful as well: https://community.sap.com/t5/welcome-corner-blog-posts/asking-good-questions-in-the-scn-discussion-spaces-will-help-you-get-good/ba-p/12880734

entry.title: Custom Logic in CREATE handler of composition items : SAP CAP
entry.content:
I have a CAP CDS application with below entities

entity Order : managed {
  key orderId: String(10);
  orderItems: Composition of many OrderItem on orderItems.order = $self;
}

entity OrderItem: managed {
  itemId: String(10);
  quantity: Integer
}

My requirement is to check if an item is there in stock when an OrderItem is created. I wrote a logic as below
Note: I have create service cds

const cds = require("@sap/cds");

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async (srv) => {
	const db = await cds.connect.to("db");
	const { OrderItems } = srv.entities;

	srv.after('CREATE', OrderItems, async (data,req) => {
		console.log(data)
		console.log(req)
	})
});

But in my case it is not reaching the console statement. Is there any way to do capture the new OrderItem in the service.

Dear Saboor,

I sent the list. I hope it's helpful to you.

entry.title: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stored Procedure Without Alias
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working with an iFlow in SAP Integration Suite that calls a stored procedure which returns a scalar value. Unfortunately, the flow fails at the JDBC adapter with the following error:

java.sql.SQLException: com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: 
Error occurred while constructing the response nodes. : 
org.xml.sax.SAXException: Nodename cannot be empty., 
cause: org.xml.sax.SAXException: Nodename cannot be empty.

The stored procedure returns a scalar value something like this:

SELECT 1234;

If it were written with an alias (e.g., SELECT 1234 AS SeqId;), the issue wouldn't occur. However, modifying the stored procedure is not an option in my case.

I've also observed that the same error occurs with simple queries like:

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table;

But it works fine if I include an alias:

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM my_table;

Since the failure happens at the JDBC adapter level, I cannot handle the response using a Groovy script or mapping step—it never reaches those steps.

My question is: Is there any way to handle responses like SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table in SAP IS without modifying the SQL or stored procedure?
I'm quite new to SAP Integration Suite, so I’d really appreciate a detailed explanation or workaround if one exists.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: aATP - FIORI App 'Manage Characteristic Catalogs' How can we add new Characteristics
entry.content:
Hello,

Trying to add new characteristics to the FIRO App 'Manage Characteristic Catalogs'. How can we add new characteristics (custom or standard) to this catalog.

no option to add from SAP Tables or structures

Thanks,

Neha

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...
entry.content:
This information is noted in the help and given the identical requirement my guess is you cannot operate with stored procedures that contain anonymous elements.  How would the parser know what to name an XML element in that case?

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Disadvantages or negative things of using user creati...
entry.content:
Hi @ismaelgodinez , hope you're doing good.

I think that there's not a complete answer for your question, since it's a broad topic. Nonetheless, wsing APIs for employee creation in SuccessFactors offers several advantages, but there are also some potential considerations to keep in mind.

While there are no direct contradictions in using APIs for employee creation, it's important to carefully consider these factors and implement appropriate safeguards and processes to ensure smooth and compliant employee creation.

Advantages:

Automation: APIs allow for automated employee creation, reducing manual data entry and improving efficiency .

Integration: APIs enable seamless integration with other systems, facilitating data synchronization across platforms.

Consistency: Automated creation via APIs ensures consistent data entry across all new employee records .

Scalability: APIs can handle bulk employee creations, which is beneficial for large-scale hiring processes .


Considerations:

Data validation: Proper validation checks must be implemented to ensure data accuracy and completeness when creating employees via APIs .

Security: API access must be carefully managed to prevent unauthorized employee creation or data breaches.

Compliance: Ensure that employee creation via APIs adheres to data privacy regulations and internal policies .

Complex scenarios: Some complex hiring scenarios may require additional steps or manual intervention beyond what the API can handle .

System dependencies: API functionality may be affected by system updates or changes, requiring ongoing maintenance and monitoring .

Field limitations: Custom or extended fields may not always be accessible through standard APIs, potentially requiring additional development .

Below you can see a blog from our Community with an example for the Employee Creation Process using API. It was created a few years ago, but it can still be used as a starting point:
Creation of an employee in SAP SuccessFactors using $batch API

Hope this can help with your initial question.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: First Half 2025 Release: What's New in SAP SuccessFactors Learning?
entry.content:
While the Improved Manager Experience seems to provide some good benefits, there are a dozen or more tools available for free or low-cost AI image generation. I can't speak for anyone else but this is not something that brings a lot of value.

The only thing I have been watching for is the xAPI support. It has been pushed from 2023 to now Q4 of 2025, and I imagine it will be pushed again when we get closer to that date.

It's imperative that we get xAPI as soon as possible. It's a more robust communication protocol, provides significant improvement for the user experience and the learning administrator, and will solve many problems that are being caused by our need to use SCORM 2004 for scoring quizzes. It's the only thing on your roadmap I have been following and that I care about, yet it's been moved back every single release cycle. Please provide more details on the challenges your team is experiencing and/or why this is not a higher priority for SAP.

entry.title: EC Business Rule related to limiting record creation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have created two payment types under bank information std portlet . and requirement is user should be able to created one record per payment types for an year . Any clue how should we go about this approach

For ex:- If payment type is payroll bank then only record should exist visa versa for other subtype of payment type. 

I guess we can control the record creation via business rule. All suggestions are welcome.

 

Thanks

Ritanshi

But next day for few components its showing in missing part reports. we have checked the ATP checkin rule for sales orders but it does not seems to be reallocating the stocks from the PO.

entry.title: Re: Hello All,Can you suggest me the table where settleme...
entry.content:
Hi Hari,

Thank you for your response,.
Business just want to update changed values into SO even though it doesn't have any effect because we will track contract changes through Delta Accrual. 
We have a custom report which shows both SO accruals & DA. 

BR
Kasi

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
hi all, 

Yes, the latest booster will setup the currency synchronization. I found MDI reporting an error because the default delivery for new S/4 Cloud systems contains ex rate defined with a valid from date 01.01.1798. 

Very strange date for SAP to choose. But if you delete them all from the S/4 Cloud and add ex rates with valid from after 01.01.1979 or later the error is gone and ex rates get synced just fine.

hope this helps, good luck!

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...
entry.content: In my question, the issue is not about input/output parameters, but about JDBC adapter failing when a scalar value is returned without a column name. That means: I do not have issues regarding how to pass or expect named parameters. I am executing something like: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM my_table; which gives a scalar result without column name, causing: SAXException: Nodename cannot be empty So the documentation you added is relevant only when calling stored procedures with named parameters and dealing with in/out types which I am anyway doing ang getting results for other SPs.

entry.title: FREE_SELECTIONS_DIALOG - force table name in where clause?
entry.content:
Is there a way to force table name in where_clauses parameter? If I show free selections for e.g. LIPS and LIKP tables, and user fills VBELN,  then in where clause I have e.g. ( VBELN EQ '1234' ) and can't use it inside select, since SAP doesn't know which VBELN column should it restrict.

Something like ( LIKP~VBELN EQ '1234' ) would take care of the problem, is there some option I'm missing?

entry.title: Free SAP Learning Hub, explore student Edition
entry.content:
Good News Students

SAP offers a wide range of free learning resources specifically for students, making it easier than ever to start building in-demand SAP skills and prepare for a future career in technology and business.

Explore Student Edition !!!

Key Highlights:

  • Student Zone: Access free learning journeys tailored for students, covering SAP solutions, business processes, and industry-relevant skills. These resources help you gain practical knowledge and boost your career prospects

  • SAP Learning Hub, Student Edition: Free for students and faculty, this edition provides full access to course content, interactive modules, live expert sessions, and even two free SAP certification exam attempts. Cloud-based practice systems are included for hands-on experience

  • Former openSAP Courses: Over 100 free, self-paced courses migrated from openSAP are now available on the SAP Learning site. These cover the latest technologies and allow you to learn at your own pace.

  • Community & Support: Join groups for beginners, aspiring consultants, data analysts, and developers. The SAP Learning Group is moderated by experts, offering a place to ask questions and collaborate with peers

  • Certification: While learning resources are free, students can take certification exams at a discounted rate, helping them stand out in the job market

How to Get Started:

  • Visit learning.sap.com and explore the Student Zone.

  • Register with your student credentials to access the Student Edition and unlock all features

  • Browse learning journeys by role or topic and join live sessions or discussion groups

Note: Some features may require your school to be eligible for the program, so check during registration

#SAP#SAPLearning

entry.title: Re: JDBC Adapter Fails to Parse Scalar Response from Stor...
entry.content: @DhrubS yes I understand that you are not referring to parameters but given the nature of how parameters work in the adapter it would stand to reason that an anonymous result would also be a problem. Solution is to name the result with an alias, and if you cannot then you cannot use the JDBC adapter.

I welcome any ideas!

TIA

entry.title: CCM: Block condition contract after final settlement is done
entry.content:
Hello All, 

 

Can anybody suggest how we can address below requirement:

BR
Kasi

entry.title: SAP Standard Attachment service- API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV- Unable to open the uploaded file.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on a Fiori Custom application, where I am trying to use the SAP Standard Attachment service- API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to upload/download attachments to a particular business object.

I am able to use the download the file attached to the business object using the GetAllOriginals Function import with relevant parameters passed to it.

But when I try to upload a file to the business object by passing relevant parameters mentioned below, even though if the file(image/pdf/excel/docx) is getting uploaded, when I try to download the uploaded file, below error occurs. Its says "We dont support this file format" for image file and "Excel cannot open file because file format issue or file extension is not valid" for excel file and for so on.

I am passing below payload and Headers to the POST request of AttachmentContentSet entity.

 var oPayload = {
                    LinkedSAPObjectKey: LinkedSAPObjectKey,
                    BusinessObjectTypeName : ObjectType,
                    FileName: oFile.name,
                    MimeType: oFile.type,
                  Content: oBinaryData, // Binary Data file content,
                    DocumentInfoRecordDocType: "GOS"
                };
 
 var oHeaders = {
                    "Slug": oFile.name,
                    "BusinessObjectTypeName": ObjectType,
                    "LinkedSAPObjectKey": LinkedSAPObjectKey,
                    "X-CSRF-Token" : token,
                    "Content-Type" : oFile.type
                };
 
My query is how the file content should be passed in Payload. I referred many SAP community posts and other blogs, still I could not find how this particular "Content" should be passed in payload. I found POST call in a blog, but they did it using POSTMAN and there its not showing exactly how we should send the data from a javascript code perspective.
 
I tried sending the file content as binary data using File reader and readAsBinaryString() function, the issue is not solved.

 

 

Can anyone who have worked on this type of requirement help me on this?
 
Thanks in advance for your help or suggestions.

entry.title: Re: Renaming the labels in tasks - SuccessFactors-Onboarding
entry.content:
Hi @LA_01 ,

Yes, in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding, it is possible to rename standard labels in tasks without necessarily having to create a custom task.

Options to Rename Standard Labels:

  1. Manage Language Tool:

    • You can use this to change standard field labels, messages, and text across the system, including onboarding tasks.

    • Go to: Admin Center > Manage Language

    • Download the language pack (e.g., English US)

    • Search for the label key or actual text string used in the onboarding task

    • Modify the label and upload the language pack back

     

Thanks,

kr,

karthick,

entry.title: Re: LMS - Virtual class with a lot of users
entry.content:
Hello @NicolòC, Hope you`re doing well

Currently this is Microsoft Teams limitation, as can I see, the large number of employees to see a session have more relation with the meeting platform guardrails, and not the LMS itself.

To check future enhancements you can access the roadmap in this link >> SAP Road Map Explorer

In case of do not encountered any reference in future release, I suggest you to create a product enhancement >> 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products - SAP ONE Support Launchpad

Depending in how relevant is, your idea can be voted and enter in a future roadmap.

I hope this helps
Regards
Daniel Romanin

* Please consider mark this answer as solution if your question was properly answered 😅

entry.title: Re: How do I make a field from a child entity available a...
Re: How do I make a field from a child entity available a...
entry.content:
Have you defined consumption on top of your root and child entity?
what if you define this on your consumption root entity :

define root view entity YYY as projection on XXX ( your root entity)
{ .... 
_child.CoolValue as coolValue
 .... } 

also your annotate should be now on YYY
annotate entity YYY with
{
....
}

and give it no annotation on annotate entity, I mean does not even define this field ( CoolValue) on entity annotation. Would you be able to see this field on filter section?

entry.title: Re: How to create or update CDC account via dataflow to t...
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari,
I understood what you were trying to reach and fully reproduced it on my side. 
gigya.accounts or gigya.generic writer steps don't cause the loginIdentifier to be automatically set by default. Maybe somewhere in your dataflow scripts/steps you have a loginIDs implementation? Please review it.

Meanwhile, I will provide you with the dataflow I've created for your case.
It consists of 4 steps:

Let's go through each of the steps in detail.

STEP 1 - Initiate record (record.evaluate)

STEP 2 - gigya.importaccount (datasource.write.gigya.importaccount)

STEP 3 - After import logic (successful). Return UID (record.evaluate)

STEP 4 - gigya.account (with nothing - to trigger webhook) (datasource.write.gigya.account)

When you execute this dataflow multiple times, one by one, you will notice that Users (with different UID) will be created in CDC (without loginIdentifiers - loginIDs)

It confirms that they don't have loginIdentifier (loginIDs), as in another case, you couldn't see them 3 there.
The same, from an API perspective.

Let me know if this could help you to cover your case.
If no or any other questions/clarifications - let's discuss it in comments under that post.

Regards,
Oleh.

entry.title: Re: INCLUDE TYPE not available on S/4 HANA?
entry.content:
It has not changed. You forgot how it's to be done 😉

INCLUDE TYPE is not part of TYPES, so you must end the previous line with dot, INCLUDE TYPE terminates with a dot, and insert "TYPES:" right after.

TYPES:
     BEGIN OF tys_extended_product_type,
        product_description        TYPE tyt_product_description_type,
        product_ewmwarehouse       TYPE tyt_product_ewmwarehouse_type.
        INCLUDE TYPE tys_product_type.
TYPES:
     END OF tys_extended_product_type.

entry.title: How do I customize the column set used to select/filter fields in a layout?
entry.content:
Hi

In SAP ECC, I would like to customize the Column Set that allows users to view subsets of data for use in transaction layouts (e.g. IW38) by adding or removing fields. E.g. where would I find where the fields are defined for the General Data or Linear Data column sets. Is this done in SPRO?

Thanks and take care,

Shayne

entry.title: Re: Automatic Hire
entry.content: How are companies dealing with data integrity with the automatic hire? I love the idea of turning this on but we see many issues with address formatting that we manually correct or the preferred name has someone's full name.

entry.title: Allocated Quantity gets doubled in APO Quota Arrangement
entry.content:
Hello community,

Hope you can help me solve this issue we're having with the Quota arrangement in SAP APO.

We're using quota arrangement to determine the Supplier for externally procured materials, so the PO is assigned to the supplier based on the allocated quantity.

We have setup a specific Storage location to receive the products. 

The issue is the allocated quantity in in the quota arrangement gets doubled when a GR is done for any of the suppliers.

As you can see in MB51 we have just one GR movement for 15,000 for supplier ending in 30. 

 

As you can see in this picture allocated quantity for supplier ending in 30 is 30,000 even if the GR was for 15,000 only.

I have checked in MSEG table, and I can only see half the qty that shows as Allocated quantity in APO.

The only other movements are 411.

According to SAP Allocated qty should only consider GR movements for a specific supplier in RCVP storage location. I have no clue why this qty is getting doubled if we don't have any other GR for the supplier. This is happening for several suppliers and products in that same location/storage loc.

Is it possible other non 101 movements are affecting the Allocated qty?

Is it possible other Storage location movements are affecting the RCVP Quota arrangement?

Any help or suggestions are greatly appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Publish to Multiple Non Recurring Pay components from...
entry.content:
Hi @varaprasadPonugoti , hope you`re doing well

Directly on the code is the best approach in my opinion, because there is no way to publish in the Employee Central the Non Recurring Payments automatically without the XML code.

To check future enhancements you can access the roadmap in this link >> SAP Road Map Explorer

In case of do not encountered any reference in future release, I suggest you to create a product enhancement >> 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products - SAP ONE Support Launchpad

Depending in how relevant is, your idea can be voted and enter in a future roadmap.

I hope this helps
Regards
Daniel Romanin

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite for DEV and PROD
entry.content: If you only have one instance via entitlement then you will have to manage it with packages for test vs. production, and flow names must be unique across the two landscapes in the single instance too.  Using packages isn't mandatory here but it would help segregate test and production flows.

entry.content:
Team,

Please let me know if " Flag for deletion " option can be deactivated \ inactivated in SAP Quality Issue Management (SAP QIM) - Status Profile for Issues [ screen shot attached], by role content change or any other options.

If yes, please share the details.

Status Profile for Issues | SAP Help Portal

Thanks 
Raj

entry.title: Re: Renaming the labels in tasks - SuccessFactors-Onboarding
entry.content: Thanks Karthick. Let me try that.

entry.title: Re: Paradox Chatbot Not Displaying Consistently in RMK site
entry.content:
Hi @NianmarieSmith ,


There are a few more things to try and some clarifications on the potential limitations I mentioned.

1. Staging Environment Limitations:

When I mentioned "staging environment limitations," I was referring to situations where a test or staging environment (like the one you're working in) may have restrictions on external resources or scripts, such as:

Blocked external scripts: Sometimes, staging environments are configured to block third-party scripts (like the Paradox Chatbot script) for security or performance reasons.

SSL/HTTPS issues: If your test site isn’t fully set up for HTTPS, some scripts may fail to load because they require secure connections.

Limited API access: Some environments may restrict API calls or require special access tokens for testing.

How to check for these limitations:

Check network requests: Open the developer tools in the browser, go to the Network tab, and refresh the page. Look for any requests to external resources (especially the chatbot script) and see if they’re being blocked due to CORS, SSL issues, or other restrictions.

Check for mixed content warnings: If your site is using HTTPS, but some resources (like scripts) are served over HTTP, browsers may block those resources, resulting in the chatbot not displaying. Look for mixed content warnings in the browser console.

Review server settings: Check with your IT or dev team to see if there are any specific restrictions on the test domain for external resources or APIs.

2. Custom Plugin and Conditional Loading:
Since the script is working fine in production but not when added globally in the CSB settings, it's possible that the custom plugin on the homepage has some additional logic that helps the chatbot initialize correctly. Specifically, this plugin might be:

Loading the script conditionally (only on the homepage), ensuring that the script executes in the correct environment.

Modifying the page structure or other settings that the chatbot relies on to load properly.

Things to try with the plugin:

Check the plugin's initialization logic: See if the custom plugin has any special conditions (like loading only on the homepage, or checking for a certain DOM element) that the chatbot script relies on.

Compare plugin to global settings: If possible, review the code in the custom plugin and compare it to how the global script is added. Look for any differences in how the chatbot is triggered or initialized.

Script delay or timing: The chatbot might rely on a specific delay or sequence of events on page load. If the plugin is handling that in a way that differs from the global JS settings, it could explain why it works on the homepage but not globally.


3. Vendor-Specific Issues:
Finally, if none of the above steps reveal any issues, it’s possible that there’s something on Paradox’s end that is causing the script to behave differently in a test environment versus production environment.

Hope this helps!!

Thank you,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Tips & Tricks with SAP Business Network for Logistics

entry.title: Re: Standard Fiori app to Custom Fiori app and convert to mobile app using HAT extension in web ide

entry.title: Avoid hardcoded cases by using joins
entry.content:
Hello,

We are working on a project where a SQL developer created plenty of hardcoded cases. Here's an example

CASE WHEN p.[TransportationGroup] IN ('0004', '0005', '0006') THEN '3'
WHEN p.[TransportationGroup] IN ('0007', '0008') THEN '2'
WHEN p.[TransportationGroup] IS NULL THEN NULL
ELSE '1'
END AS [SimplePackingCode]

I would like to avoid such and can quite easily creae a local table (based on csv files) that would look like this.

DOMAIN,TYPE,SOURCE_VALUE,FIELD_1,FIELD_2,FIELD_3
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"0004","3"
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"0005","3"
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"0006","3"
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"0007","2"
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"0008","2"
MD,PRD_TRANSGRP_SPACK,"_NULL_","_NULL_"
While playing in the join field that a NULL becomes a _NULL_ value we can solve the NULL problem, but that ELSE is giving me quite some problems...
 
I know I can solve it in 2 steps, 2 joins, first a left to the local table, then a cross to a single record containing the else and then a calculated column...
 
But wondering if somebody has a better idea ?

entry.title: Re: Request for Dataset or Query to Report "Started" Stat...
entry.content:
Hi @LakshyaSap , hope you`re doing well

Using the report "Online Item Status", you can check the columns >>

User FinishedUser Has Access
NoYes
NoYes

I think that with this two columns you can retrieve the "Started" without query or any other customization in the reports.

Sorry in case of this isn`t your request, so let me know in doubt case.

To check future enhancements you can access the roadmap in this link >> SAP Road Map Explorer

In case of do not encountered any reference in future release, I suggest you to create a product enhancement >> 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products - SAP ONE Support Launchpad

Depending in how relevant is, your idea can be voted and enter in a future roadmap.

I hope this helps
Regards
Daniel Romanin

entry.title: Re: iContent Storage Managment
entry.content:
Hello @cnewman , hope you`re doing well

There is no a formula to manage unused contents, but I`d like to suggest two ways:

1 - Our PCM (Premium Content Management) team, can assist you according the best practices in manage content. They have customized reports to detect the contents not used for a long time. Reach your SAP Account Manager described in this KBA >> 2552965 - How to contact the Premium Content Management (PCM) team? - SAP for Me

2 - Extracting two reports, Item Details and Learning History, you can cross the information and find the course with no more access in a large number of months, for example 3 years without any record. 

To check future enhancements you can access the roadmap in this link >> SAP Road Map Explorer

In case of do not encountered any reference in future release, I suggest you to create a product enhancement >> 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products - SAP ONE Support Launchpad

Depending in how relevant is, your idea can be voted and enter in a future roadmap.

I hope this helps
Regards
Daniel Romanin
* Please consider mark this answer as solution if your question was properly answered

entry.title: Re: " Maintain serial numbers for total quantity " while doing Goods Receipt against produ
entry.content: e.g. 10 pcs, you need to enter 10 serial numbers. If it is 2 digit pcs we need to maintain 2 digit of serial number or what ? OR if it is 2 digit pcs we need to maintain 3 digit of serial number

entry.title: Re: CSB: custom font
entry.content:
Hi @Abdelrani1 ,

Please try below and see if it works.

Login to CSB (Career Site Builder):

Access the "Theme" Settings:

Navigate to Themes. This is where you'll configure the overall look and feel of your site, including fonts, colors, and text styles.

Edit Your Theme:

In Theme Settings, there will be an option for Global Styles. These are where you define font families, colors, and other shared design elements.

Look for the CSS section where fonts are defined. Typically, this might look like:

css:
body { font-family: 'OldFont', Arial, sans-serif; }
Replace Old Font with the name of your new custom font.

css:
body { font-family: 'YourNewCustomFont', Arial, sans-serif; }
Apply Font to Specific Components:

If you want to ensure the new font is applied to specific text components (like headings, paragraphs, etc.), you can update the relevant CSS classes:

css;
.heading { font-family: 'YourNewCustomFont', sans-serif; } .text-component { font-family: 'YourNewCustomFont', sans-serif; }


You can apply this across the theme’s global CSS to ensure it affects all text components, headers, footers, and other sections.

Preview Changes:

After making the changes, preview the site to ensure the new font is applied across all the pages (Home, Content, Category, Landing, etc.).

Publish the Changes:

Once you’ve confirmed the new font is displayed correctly, publish the changes. This will apply the new font across both Test and Production environments.

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Avoid hardcoded cases by using joins
entry.content: Here is a Sample on how it Could work, no Tables here just sample

entry.title: Re: Avoid hardcoded cases by using joins
entry.content:
Here is a Sample on how it could work, I used no tables so that it works on every SQL, but this is a 2-config-table solution, so quite some work, there are over 100 of such cases in his "solution"

SELECT S1.Product
     , S1.Cat
	 , S3.Final
	 , S4.Final
	 , CASE WHEN S1.Cat IS NOT NULL AND S3.Final IS NULL THEN S4.Final ELSE S3.Final END AS RealFinal
  FROM (SELECT 'X1' AS Product, '0002' AS Cat
        UNION ALL
		SELECT 'X2' AS Product, '0002' AS Cat
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'X3' AS Product, '0003' AS Cat
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'X4' AS Product, NULL AS Cat
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 'X5' AS Product, '9999' AS Cat
	   ) S1
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT *
                     FROM (SELECT '0002' AS Cat, '22' AS Final
                           UNION ALL
                           SELECT '0003' AS Cat, '33' AS Final
                           UNION ALL
		                   SELECT '_NULL_' AS Cat, NULL AS Final
	                      ) S2
				  ) S3 ON S3.Cat = COALESCE(S1.CAT,'_NULL_')
       CROSS JOIN (SELECT '_ELSE_' AS Cat, '00' AS Final
				  ) S4

entry.title: Regístrate en XT con el código de rеfеrеnсiа "FE186F" y obtén bonos exclusivos
entry.content:
Si estás empezando en el mundo del trading, XT es una plataforma internacional que combina innovación, seguridad y una interfaz fácil de usar.
Al crear tu cuenta con el código de rеfеrеnсiа FE186F, accederás a beneficios especiales como bonos de bienvenida, descuentos en comisiones y promociones exclusivas para nuevos usuarios.

İstersen bu metnin e-posta versiyonunu, sosyal medya gönderisi şeklini veya kısa açıklama formatını da hazırlayabilirim. Hangi formatta kullanacaksın?

entry.title: Quantity Validation flag in Manage Routings/Recipes app
entry.content:
In this blog, I will show you what 'Quantity Validation' flag in Manage Routings/Recipes app can be used for, in the context of Order POD execution. 

'Quantity Validation' flag can be defined in Manage Routings/Recipes app under 'Routing/Recipe Details' as follows:

Where

Yes: Allows you to perform activities such as reporting, starting a phase or operation, posting consumption and so on in a sequence.

You must post some Yield/Scrap Quantity Confirmation before you can start the 2nd phase onwards.

No: Allows you to start and complete an Charge or SFC at any phase or operation without reporting any quantity on the previous steps.

For example, in Order POD, you would be able to start Phase 0012 without posting any Yield/Scrap for Phase 0011.

For Work Center / Operation Activity PODs, 'Quantity Validation' flag as "YES" is mandatory.

'Quantity Validation' flag can also be set via XSLT, see:

  • Setting the Quantity Validation via XSLT for Recipe

  • Setting the Quantity Validation via XSLT for Routing

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Зарегистрируйтесь на XT с реферальным кодом "FE186F" и получите доступ к эксклюзивным бонусам
entry.content: Если вы новичок в трейдинге, XT — это международная платформа, которая сочетает в себе инновации, безопасность и простоту использования. Создав учетную запись с пригласительным кодом FE186F, вы получите немедленный доступ к особым преимуществам, таким как приветственные бонусы, скидки на комиссионные и эксклюзивные акции для новых пользователей.

entry.title: Đăng ký trên XT với Mã giới thiệu "FE186F" và Truy cập Tiền thưởng Độc quyền
entry.content: Nếu bạn mới tham gia giao dịch, XT là một nền tảng quốc tế kết hợp tính sáng tạo, bảo mật và dễ sử dụng. Bằng cách tạo tài khoản của bạn với mã mời FE186F, bạn sẽ được truy cập ngay vào các lợi ích đặc biệt như tiền thưởng chào mừng, chiết khấu hoa hồng và các chương trình khuyến mãi độc quyền dành cho người dùng mới.

entry.title: Re: Unable to find/enter active license key for CAL
entry.content: Email sent. Many thanks!

entry.title: รหัสแนะนำ XT: FE186F
entry.content:
หากคุณกำลังมองหาโอกาสในการเริ่มต้นเทรดคริปโตอย่างคุ้มค่า แพลตฟอร์ม XT คือทางเลือกที่ยอดเยี่ยม ลงทะเบียนวันนี้โดยใช้ รหัสแนะนำ XT: FE186F เพื่อรับสิทธิประโยชน์มากมาย ทั้งสำหรับผู้เริ่มต้นและผู้ใช้งานระยะยาว

เพียงกรอก รหัส FE186F ตอนสมัครสมาชิก คุณจะได้รับสิทธิพิเศษดังนี้:

สิทธิประโยชน์รายละเอียด
โบนัสสมัครสมาชิกใหม่รับทันที 1,000 USDT หลังจากลงทะเบียนและทำตามเงื่อนไขเบื้องต้น
ส่วนลดค่าธรรมเนียมลด 40% จากค่าธรรมเนียมการเทรดทั้งหมด
รหัสใช้งานได้ตลอดชีพรหัส FE186F สามารถใช้ได้ไม่หมดอายุ ใช้ได้เรื่อย ๆ

วิธีเริ่มต้น:

  1. สมัครบัญชีใหม่บนแพลตฟอร์ม XT

  2. กรอกรหัสแนะนำ FE186F ตอนลงทะเบียน

  3. เริ่มต้นเทรดและรับสิทธิพิเศษทันที

สมัครวันนี้เพื่อเริ่มต้นเส้นทางการลงทุนของคุณอย่างมั่นใจ พร้อมสิทธิประโยชน์พิเศษที่หาไม่ได้จากที่อื่น

entry.title: Re: Report to show which assignment profile rule(s) apply...
entry.content:
Adding more information regarding the tables for Assignment Profiles >>

ASSIGNMENT PROFILES:

PA_ASSGN_PRFL – Assignment Profile record information and job_id (PH – History table available)

To tell via DB if an AP is propagated, you need to check PA_ASSGN_PRFL to see if it has a job_id.

Any entities an AP is to assign will be in their respective tables:

•ITEM - CPNT  (PA_CPNT_AP)

•CURRICULA - QUAL –  (PA_QUAL_AP)

•CATALOG – (PA_CATALOG_AP)

•PROGRAMS (PA_PROGRAM_AP)

•ROLES (PA_ROLE_AP)

•PA_STUD_ASSGN_PRFL to show all users that were ever in an AP (PH table will show the history)

•PA_AP…tables manage Rules and attributes used by APs – DOMAIN, ATTRIBUTE etc.

•PA_AP_CHANGES – AP changes

•PA_AP_ATTRIBUTE – filters like User Id, Active, Domain

•PA_AP_DOMAIN – domains associated with each AP

•PA_AP_ATTR_VAL – AP attribute values

•PA_AP_STUD_CHANGES – shows users history of Aps they have been in / removed from (ACTION col.)

entry.title: XT रेफरल कोड: FE186F
entry.content:
अगर आप ट्रेडिंग की दुनिया में नए हैं, तो XT एक भरोसेमंद अंतरराष्ट्रीय प्लेटफ़ॉर्म है जो नवाचार, सुरक्षा और उपयोग में आसान इंटरफ़ेस प्रदान करता है। आज ही XT पर अकाउंट बनाएं और रजिस्ट्रेशन के समय रेफरल कोड FE186F दर्ज करें, ताकि आप विशेष लाभों का तुरंत लाभ उठा सकें।

नीचे दिए गए फायदे सिर्फ नए उपयोगकर्ताओं के लिए हैं:

लाभ विवरण

रेफरल कोडFE186F
रजिस्ट्रेशन बोनससफल पंजीकरण के बाद तुरंत 1,000 USDT प्राप्त करें
ट्रेडिंग शुल्क में छूटसभी ट्रेडों पर 40% तक की छूट प्राप्त करें
लाइफटाइम वैध कोडFE186F कोड हमेशा के लिए वैध है, इसकी कोई समाप्ति तिथि नहीं है

कैसे शुरू करें:

  1. XT ऐप डाउनलोड करें और नया खाता बनाएं

  2. रजिस्ट्रेशन के दौरान FE186F कोड दर्ज करें

  3. ट्रेडिंग शुरू करें और अपने बोनस और छूट का लाभ उठाएं

यह एक सीमित समय का अवसर है, इसलिए अभी पंजीकरण करें और स्मार्ट तरीके से निवेश की शुरुआत करें

entry.title: Re: How to receive the Manifesto de Destinario in DRC in Brazil?
entry.content: Hello all we are implementing DRC NFE , but for inbound perspective I mean to have Manisfesto Destinatario we are facing an issue when we are trying to activate the events in EDOC_BR_MNG_NFE_EVT We are receiving this error message : Error while retrieving data; check HTTP 404 - URL not found. Enter a valid PATH and H Message no. EDOCUMENT_BR260 Any idea what is missing

entry.title: XT жолдамалық коды: FE186F
entry.content:
Егер сіз саудамен (трейдингпен) жаңадан айналыса бастасаңыз, XT — бұл қауіпсіздік, инновация және қолдануға ыңғайлылықты біріктіретін халықаралық платформа.
Жаңа тіркелу кезінде FE186F жолдамалық кодын енгізу арқылы сіз бірқатар ерекше артықшылықтарға қол жеткізе аласыз.

Тек жаңа қолданушылар үшін арнайы ұсыныстар төменде көрсетілген:

Жолдамалық кодFE186F
Тіркелу бонусыЖаңа есептік жазба жасағаннан кейін 1 000 USDT бонус алыңыз
Комиссиялық жеңілдікБарлық сауда-саттықтарда 40% дейінгі комиссия жеңілдігі
Мәңгілік жарамдылықFE186F кодының қолданылу мерзімі шектелмеген, ол үнемі жарамды

Бастау жолы:

  1. XT қосымшасын жүктеп, жаңа есептік жазба жасаңыз

  2. Тіркелу кезінде FE186F кодын енгізіңіз

  3. Сауданы бастап, барлық артықшылықтарды пайдаланыңыз

Бұл мүмкіндікті жіберіп алмаңыз – дәл қазір тіркеліп, тиімді сауда жасауды бастаңыз

entry.title: XT Жолдомо коду: FE186F
entry.content:
Эгер сиз соода дүйнөсүнө жаңы кирип жатсаңыз, анда XT — бул инновацияны, коопсуздукту жана колдонууга ыңгайлуулукту айкалыштырган эл аралык платформа.
Жаңы катталуу учурунда FE186F жолдомо кодун колдонуу менен, сиз бир катар өзгөчө артыкчылыктарга ээ болосуз.

Төмөндө жаңы колдонуучулар үчүн жеткиликтүү болгон негизги сунуштар:

Жолдомо кодуFE186F
Катталуу бонусуКатталгандан кийин дароо 1 000 USDT бонус алыңыз
Комиссия жеңилдиктериСоода үчүн комиссиядан 40% чейин жеңилдик алыңыз
Туруктуу кодFE186F коду мөөнөтсүз — каалаган убакта колдонууга жарактуу

entry.title: Issue with billing Document type F2
entry.content:
Issue Details:

 

The business have requirement for triggering 4 different Invoice billing documents and in S4 PERSON_NAME Public Cloud, we have only 1 billing document type (F2 ).

 

With OPD configuration, system is able to recognize only one document type and the same is triggering every time based on the defined rules for determination.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue with billing Document type F2
entry.content:
In standard Public Cloud this is not possible, unfortunately it's not the same logic as for Purchase Orders, we cannot customizing billing types in Public Cloud. 

As a workaround is possible to be done using different Roles, you can use different roles between the form templates, setting up via Output Parameter Determination. In the KBAs below there is an explanation:

0003320132 - Different/Multiple forms for the same business application document - S/4HANA Cloud

2757763 - How to print to multiple print queues or generate multiple output items

entry.title: Error in classic story conversion of "Root path missing from hierarchy path"
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am converting Analytics Cloud Classic Stories to the Optimized Design Experience and get this error in some:

("Something went wrong while converting the story to Optimized Design Experience.  Root missing from hierarchy path.")

has anyone else run into this error and, if so, how did you resolve?

Thanks, Dan

entry.title: AO Workbook with 2 different connections
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an AO workbook with 2 datasources (from two different sources...one from S/4 and one from BW). The AO is published in the BW. When we transported the AO workbook from Dev to QA, the BW dev datasource switched to BW QA correctly whereas the S/4 is still pointing to the S/4 Dev. Is there any configuration available that can re-adjust the AO connections (like schema mapping) once we deploy the AO workbooks to QA or Prod?

Thanks,

Hasmath
